profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk provides freight forwarding services for export and import in Indonesia. The company operates through two segments, Land Transportation Services and Real Estate. It offers international sea and air freight; trucking and custom brokerage; and reefer cargo services; and transportation management services, which include handling of shipping and/or packing of goods. The company also engages in the real estate development activities. PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia.
